'''Fleet Group Two''' was one of three [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleets]] that saw service during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], participating in the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]] and the [[Battle of Ebaq]] 9. The units of the fleet group were eventually redistributed into the greater military after the government's reorganization.

==History==
Along with [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Traest Kre'fey]]'s [[Fleet Group One]], Group Two was stationed directly above [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] as the anvil to the hammer of [[Fleet Group Three]], which was commanded by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]. Fleet Group Two was commanded by General [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]] aboard the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Bail Organa (Star Destroyer)|''Bail Organa'']] During the battle the fleet suffered heavy losses to the vast enemy armada as it stormed the capital [[Planet/Legends|world's]] defenses.

The remnants of the fleet retreated along with Bel Iblis to the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]], where they made the [[Tallaani Shipyards|shipyards]] of [[Tallaan]] their base of operations for the next year. In this time, Bel Iblis switched flagships from the ''Bail Organa'' to the much larger [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] warship [[Harbinger (Mon Calamari Star Cruiser)|''Harbinger'']]. In preparation for the ambush planned at [[Ebaq 9]] by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] journeyed to Tallaan in order to recruit Bel Iblis and his forces for the coming battle. He succeeded, and a significant portion of Fleet Group Two, divided into three large battle groups, were sent in to ambush [[Tsavong Lah]]'s fleet after it had been lured into the system.

After the [[Battle of Ebaq|victory at Ebaq]], the New Republic was reorganized into the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]], and the fleet group's assets were redistributed among the rest of the new government's [[Galactic Alliance Defense Force|defense force]].
